name: Fried Rice with Basil (Khao Pad Krapow)
recipeIngredient: 3 Small fresh red or green chilis, finely chopped
1 Small bundle of long beans OR French/snap beans, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 Small red or green pepper, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or frying pan until a light haze appears.
2. Add garlic and chilis; fry until garlic is golden brown.
3. Add mushrooms and onions; stir quickly.
4. Add cooked rice; stir thoroughly.
5. Add long beans, peppers, sugar, and light soy sauce; stir thoroughly.
6. At the last moment, quickly stir in basil leaves and serve on a dish.
